title: VERIMER (Data Application and Research Center)
content:
VERIMER (Data Application and Research Center)

By clicking on the headings below,

VERIMER (Data Application and Research Center)

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Related Faculties

, whose regulation was published in the official gazette dated

21.03.2019

and numbered

30721

, was established within Üsküdar University. Our main goal is to serve researchers in all processes from data collection to analysis and interpretation in academic or other sectors by adhering to scientific and ethical principles. In addition, organizing training and certificate programs in the field of applied statistics is another activity of the center.
